title: Add PutSignaturesWithFormat/GetSignaturesWithFormat to OCI layout
body:
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/common-files/blob/master/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

This PR is copied from https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2934 .

This PR adds PutSignaturesWithFormat/GetSignaturesWithFormat support to OCI layout.
The general idea is tag-based discovery, same as sigstore signature discovery.

It stores the signature with `annotation org.opencontainers.image.ref.name: "sha256-<hash>.sig"`, which can be used as a tag. https://specs.opencontainers.org/image-spec/image-layout/#IMAGE-SPEC-IMAGE-LAYOUT-19

Fixes #186

comments.body:
The `common/pkg/manifests/manifests_test.go` tests might be fixed by #314.

The “Skopeo test” failures here look relevant, I’m not immediately sure (I’m afraid I didn’t yet read the updated version of this PR) whether they are bugs to be fixed here, or whether the tests will need to be adjusted.
This is the commit https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/312/commits/ffcc12600ca6c60b6ac0518116dedb988d10d6a5 to fix the CI
@mtrmac PTAL when you have a moment. thanks!
✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6394**

@mtrmac I'd appreciate if you could give another round of review.
I'll fix [validate / git-validate (pull_request)](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/actions/runs/18156833159/job/51678563078?pr=312) when everything is sorted out.
✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6595**

Hi @mtrmac , could you please give another review on this? thanks!

If there's any blocker, please let me know.
This feature is required to support OCI artifacts signature.
I’m sorry, I do want to get back to reviewing this, and I do care about signatures in OCI — but I’ll probably not be able to do it before the end of the year.
